title: Goose Fat Knead Bliss
description: A unique and indulgent Australian dish combining umami flavors with a crispy texture, ideal for sick days or as a gluten-free treat.

ingredients.name: Goose Fat
ingredients.notes: Organic and cold-pressed for best flavor.

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Fresh, peeled for optimal garlic aroma.

ingredients.name: Celery Seeds
ingredients.notes: To add a unique crunch and depth of flavor.

ingredients.name: All-Purpose Flour
ingredients.notes: A gluten-free alternative for those with gluten sensitivities.

ingredients.name: Vegetable Oil
ingredients.notes: For frying the knead bliss to perfection.

ingredients.name: Soy Sauce
ingredients.notes: To enhance umami flavors and add a savory depth to the dish.

ingredients.name: Water
ingredients.notes: To moisten and bind the ingredients together.

instructions: Mix all ingredients in a bowl until well combined, ensuring the goose fat is fully incorporated.
Divide the mixture into small portions to shape them into balls or patties. These are your 'knead bliss.'
In a frying pan, heat up the vegetable oil over medium-high heat.
Once hot, add the knead bliss and cook for about 2 minutes on each side until golden brown and crispy.
Remove from heat and serve immediately with soy sauce drizzled over them to enhance the flavors.
